summary: P0 Multi-part Request Testing Complete - All features verified working. 1) Care API includes 'feed' type with nutrition services, 2) Paperwork/Insure APIs working correctly, 3) Nudges API returns 14 nudge configurations, 4) Pet Profile pillar links navigate correctly with ?pet= parameter, 5) Scheduler configured for Mira nudges at 10 AM IST

issues: Feed & Nutrition type exists in API but not displayed in Care Services navigation bar - may need frontend update to show all care types

BACKEND_TEST_01_care_types_feed.details: GET /api/care/types returns 'feed' type with name='Feed & Nutrition', category='nutrition', icon='🍖', subtypes=['diet_planning', 'weight_management', 'allergy_diet', 'puppy_nutrition', 'senior_nutrition', 'prescription_diet']

BACKEND_TEST_03_paperwork_insure_request.details: POST /api/paperwork/insure/request creates insurance request with request_id starting with 'INS-', returns ticket_id and estimated_response

BACKEND_TEST_04_nudges_admin_types.details: GET /api/nudges/admin/types returns 14 nudge types including vaccination_reminder, grooming_reminder, birthday_reminder, gotcha_day_reminder, health_checkup

BACKEND_TEST_05_care_request_feed_type.details: POST /api/care/request with care_type='feed' creates request successfully with unified flow (notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id)

FRONTEND_TEST_01_pet_profile_page.details: Pet Profile page for Mojo (pet-99a708f1722a) loads correctly with data-testid='unified-pet-page', shows 38% Soul Score, Soul Seeker tier

FRONTEND_TEST_02_pillar_links.details: Found 14 pillar links with ?pet=pet-99a708f1722a parameter format

FRONTEND_TEST_03_celebrate_navigation.details: Clicking Celebrate pillar card navigates to /celebrate?pet=pet-99a708f1722a correctly

FRONTEND_TEST_04_care_navigation.details: Clicking Care pillar card navigates to /care?pet=pet-99a708f1722a correctly

SCHEDULER_TEST_01_mira_nudges.details: Scheduler configured with process_mira_nudges job at CronTrigger(hour=4, minute=30) = 10 AM IST

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update Care page frontend to display 'Feed & Nutrition' in the Care Services navigation bar (backend API already supports it)
seed_data_creation: Test requests created with TEST_ prefix for insurance and care feed requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working: 1) Care API 'feed' type with nutrition services, 2) Paperwork/Insure APIs, 3) Nudges API with 14 types, 4) Pet Profile pillar links with ?pet= parameter, 5) Mira nudges scheduler at 10 AM IST. Feed & Nutrition exists in backend but not shown in Care page UI navigation.
